name: Eliot Vance Photography
title: Photo portfolio
summary: A calm, image-first portfolio for a landscape and travel photographer, with named photo series, a full-screen lightbox, an about page, and a contact form.
setup_questions: What's the photographer's name and one-line specialty (e.g. landscape, weddings, editorial)?
What are 3–4 photo series you want as galleries, and their names?
What's your contact email and Instagram handle?
Do you sell prints, or is this portfolio-and-inquiry only?
photo_terms: coastal cliffs golden hour wide shot
sections: Full-bleed hero image with name and tagline
Work index — thumbnail grid of named series (e.g. Iceland, Coastline, Portraits)
Series gallery page with masonry grid and keyboard-navigable lightbox
Contact — short form plus Instagram and email
based_on: A minimalist single-photographer portfolio in the mold of Format/22Slides sites like William Lambelet — image-first, lots of whitespace, work organized into a few named series.
